untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparison of option time value premium against projected special dividend amount. Neither 'option time value premium' nor 'projected special dividend amount' are available in the allowed indicators list. These are external/fundamental data inputs (option Greeks and corporate event forecasts) that fall outside technical indicator scope.
translation_notes: This is a risk arbitrage strategy combining stock purchase with protective put, conditioned on option valuation metrics. The core logic (put time value < dividend projection) cannot be expressed using only technical price/volume indicators. Requires external data sources: (1) option chain data with Greeks/time value calculations, (2) special dividend projection/announcement data. A practical implementation would need integration with options data APIs and corporate event databases.
